login.title: Access your field notebook and manage the orchard from one place.
login.description: Check sowing plans, irrigation tasks, plot tracking, and crop recommendations with your authorized Google account.

stats.plotsDescription: Track every bed and active crop
stats.harvestDescription: Prepare the season with centralized data

login.panelDescription: Sign in with Google to access the crop dashboard and daily tracking.
login.panelInfo: Use the team account to review campaigns, log work, and check crop alerts.
login.helpText: You can sign in with Google or use anonymous access to explore the portal without linking a team account.

errors.google: Google sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.guest: Guest access could not be started. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Main dashboard
dashboard.description: From here you can coordinate sowing, review the status of each plot, and keep your team aligned throughout the season.
dashboard.dayDescription: Keep track of the day and share incidents with the team from the portal.

cards.pendingDescription: Work not started yet or just scheduled.
cards.inProgressDescription: Tasks the team is actively working on.

chart.title: Daily task status
chart.description: This chart uses Ignite UI to show how many tasks exist per day and by type, with the date on the X axis and the task count on the Y axis.
chart.subtitle: Three lines for Pending, In progress, and Done
chart.emptyTitle: There are not enough dated tasks yet to render the series.
chart.emptyDescription: Once real tasks with `createdAt` exist, this section will display the daily evolution of their status.

firestore.title: Tasks connected to Firestore

form.title: Add Firestore tasks from the dashboard
form.description: This form stores real documents in users/{uid}/tasks for the authenticated account. As soon as you save a task, it will appear in the list.
form.success: The task was saved in Firestore.

guest.notice: You are signed in as a guest. You can review tasks, but you cannot create new ones.

firestore.emptyTitle: There are no real Firestore tasks for this account yet.
firestore.emptyDescription: Create documents in users/{uid}/tasks with the fields title, area, status, and createdAt so this view can render real data.
firestore.setupTitle: Use Firestore as your first database
firestore.setupDescription: You do not need a custom backend to get started. You can store tasks and crop follow-up data in Firestore now and add Cloud Functions or a dedicated server later if needed.

errors.required: Fill in title and area before saving.
errors.save: The task could not be saved to Firestore.
errors.update: The task status could not be updated.
errors.delete: The task could not be deleted.
errors.config: Configure Firebase and sign in with a valid account before saving tasks.

analysisTemporarilyHidden.title: CV analysis is disabled for now
analysisTemporarilyHidden.description: I have hidden this part of the interface temporarily so it does not appear in the dashboard while we work on other changes.

analysis.title: Analyze CV PDF
analysis.description: This area is only shown for the authorized account and extracts key data from a CV PDF to summarize the profile and suggest presentation improvements.
analysis.success: The file was analyzed successfully in the browser.

errors.required: Select a file before analyzing it.
errors.save: The file could not be analyzed.
errors.unauthorized: Your account is not authorized to analyze files.

dashboard.nextStepDescription: With authentication in place, the natural next step is to connect real plots, crops, and records from your backend or database.

notFound.title: The screen you're looking for does not exist in Huerto.
notFound.description: Check the address or return to a known area of the portal to keep working.

backend.title: The operation could not be completed with the server.
backend.description: The app detected an error in a backend request. You can try again or return to a safe screen while the incident is being reviewed.
backend.defaultMessage: An unexpected error occurred while processing the request.

auth.configGoogle: Configure Firebase in the environment files to enable Google sign-in.
auth.configGuest: Configure Firebase in the environment files to enable anonymous access.
